Lord Arryn

  • Lord of the Eyrie[1]
  • Defender of the Vale[1]
  • Warden of the East[1]
Allegiance House Arryn
Culture Valemen

the Mountains of the Moon[1]

  • Sons[1]
  • Jeyne Arryn[1]
Book Fire & Blood (mentioned)

Lord Arryn was the Lord of the Eyrie and the head of House Arryn during the late reign of King Jaehaerys I Targaryen.

History[ ]

Lord Arryn and his sons were killed by Stone Crows in 97 AC. He was succeeded as ruler of the Vale of Arryn by his daughter, Jeyne.[1] As Jeyne was three years old at the time of her father's death, Lord Yorbert Royce ruled in her stead as regent and Lord Protector of the Vale during her minority.[3][4]

Family[ ]

His relation to his predecessor Lord Rodrik Arryn is unknown. As he was born when Rodrik was married to his first wife who gave him two sons[2][5] and he is known to have had a younger brother,[6] he was likely Rodrik's eldest son.
